basic_details.job_title: SFIO – Assistant Director, Senior Prosecutor and More – 38 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO), Government of India
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Director, Senior Prosecutor and More – 38 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) has released recruitment notification for 38 vacancies on deputation basis across 14 posts including Joint Director, Deputy Director, Senior Assistant Director and more. Last date to apply is 29 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, LLB, CA, MBA/PGDM

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-8 to Level-12 (7th CPC Pay Matrix)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline by Speed Post in the prescribed Bio-Data/CV proforma. The application must be routed through the applicant's Cadre Controlling Authority (CCA) - direct applications will not be considered. Candidates applying for more than one post must send a separate application for each post with all required documents. The complete application must reach SFIO's New Delhi address on or before 29 July 2026.
seo_tags: SFIO Recruitment 2026 - 38 Vacancies for Joint Director, Deputy Director & Other Posts | Apply by 29 July 2026
